title: Peformance Pack
description: Its an optimization pack, with optimazation mods.
body:
# Performance Pack

**A lightweight Fabric optimization pack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, improves chunk loading, and keeps Minecraft completely vanilla.**

## Boost Your FPS. Keep Vanilla Minecraft.

Performance Pack is a lightweight Fabric modpack that makes Minecraft run faster, smoother, and more efficiently without changing gameplay.

Whether you're playing on a low-end laptop or a high-end gaming PC, this pack helps reduce lag, improve frame rates, speed up chunk loading, and lower memory usage while keeping the vanilla experience intact.

## Features

🚀 Higher FPS through modern rendering optimizations

⚡ Faster chunk loading and world generation

🧠 Lower RAM usage and improved memory management

🔧 Reduced stuttering and smoother gameplay

🌍 Better performance in large worlds, villages, and redstone builds

🛡️ Stability improvements and vanilla bug fixes

🔍 Zoom functionality and useful quality-of-life enhancements

## Included Optimizations

This pack combines some of the most trusted performance mods available for Fabric, including Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Starlight, ImmediatelyFast, Noisium, and more.

## Perfect For

* Players with low-end PCs looking for more FPS
* Players who want smoother gameplay without changing Minecraft
* Multiplayer players wanting better performance
* Modpack users looking for a lightweight optimization base

## No Gameplay Changes

Performance Pack does not add new items, blocks, mobs, dimensions, or mechanics. Everything remains vanilla—just faster.

Install it, launch Minecraft, and enjoy a smoother experience.
